rules.rule_text:
rule ggupdate_windows
{
	meta:
		description = "ggupdate.exe keylogger (Windows)"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Les Blues"
		$s2 = "lesblues.exe"
		$s3 = "Boodled8"
		$s4 = "Misexplain6"
		$s5 = "lesblues"
		$s6 = "Sniffs5"
		$s7 = "Oneiromancy"
		$s8 = "Lophtcrack" ascii wide

	condition:
		IsPeFile and 3 of them
}

rule ggupdate_linux
{
	meta:
		description = "ggupdate keylogger (Linux)"

	strings:
		$s1 = "%s.Identifier"
		$s2 = "0:%llu:%s;"
		$s3 = "%s%.2d-%.2d-%.4d"
		$s4 = "[%s] - [%.2d/%.2d/%d %.2d:%.2d:%.2d]"

	condition:
		IsElfFile and 3 of them
}
